title: euphrasia corcontica
intro: Euphrasia corcontica, also known as the Alpine Eyebright, is a perennial plant species found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it effective in treating eye and skin conditions such as conjunctivitis, conjunctival inflammation, and wounds. The health benefits of Euphrasia corcontica include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Euphrasia corcontica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
